Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Akihiko, regarding mathematical proofs... How would you approach this one?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Trigonometry, huh? This is a fun one. I'd say using the law of cosines here would be the quickest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}First, you need to set up an equation. Then, since a and c are prime numbers, you can rearrange it like this, and... done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}C'est magnifique! A brilliant method.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I thought these kinds of problems were easy for you. Were you just testing me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I didn't mean anything by it. True, I did have in mind a number of ways to solve this...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}But I found myself wondering about your thought process. I have to say, your speed and accuracy were impressive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Then I'll test you on the next one. Let's race and see who can solve it quicker![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of them are taking[n]their studies seriously...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try to focus as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Oh, it's been quite some time already... We should remember to take breaks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You've got a point... Focusing for too long has diminishing returns. Let's rest for a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Well then, why don't we resume in twenty minutes? You can spend your time however you'd like until then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh, come to think of it, I haven't gotten any running in today... Guess I'll head out for a refresher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You're leaving the building? You do understand we only have twenty minutes, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Even a short workout's a nice change of pace. What were you guys planning on doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I was thinking of making some tea... What about you, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You hear that, Mitsuru? Looks like {f 4 1} and I are on the same page.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm well aware that exercise is good for the brain. What I'm worried about is your lack of restraint.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Every time you run, you push yourself to the limit. I would hardly call that a "refresher."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Yeah, I know I tend to go a little overboard... sometimes, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...Fine, I won't go for a run. Guess I'll just do a few stretches.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Ooh, a fine choice. I often read books on my breaks myself.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Let's see, why don't I ready enough tea for all three of us? Akihiko, it wouldn't hurt to try reading for a change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Fine... Guess I'll join you guys this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Haha... Doodling, huh? I used to do that a lot back in the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}You, doodling? That's quite a surprise. I don't think I've seen you do anything of the sort.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Miki used to ask me to draw things. I practiced like a madman trying to learn how to draw anime characters...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Oh? That's an interesting development. Why don't you show us for old times' sake?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Spare me, please. If anything, I'd rather see what {f 4 1} is drawing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After the break, we got back to studying...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The subtle tension in the air[n]helped me stay on track...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I appreciate you inviting us today. You wanted to help take our minds off of recent events, didn't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Haha... Did you think we didn't notice?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You know, it's usually the senpai's role to do these kinds of things... But we decided to take you up on it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Thanks to this, Akihiko and I were able to get back on our feet. You can expect we'll return the favor in kind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Yeah. We'll help push you as far as your brain can go. Your exams won't know what hit 'em![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}For now, let's call it a day. Make sure to get your rest, both of you.[n]{f 1 1}
